localizations.title: The House on the Hill
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Did you take a close look at the wallpaper next to the pedestal table?
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Did you look in the fireplace?
localizations.code_1243: The buttons are in the right position. The chest opens.
localizations.code_1348: You made it!  You unlocked the closet.
localizations.code_1815: When you pronounce these words, the book seems to come to life, but nothing happens. You must find a way to open it!
localizations.code_3726: The padlock of the book opens.
localizations.code_4829: When you pronounce these words, the book seems to come to life, but nothing happens. You must find a way to open it!
localizations.code_7361: The bookcase pivots, revealing a hidden passage.
localizations.code_3728: The padlock of the book opens.
localizations.hint_2: The code is probably somewhere in the room. Maybe on the mask?
localizations.hint_3_first: A smell of lemon comes from the leaf. Is it invisible ink?
localizations.hint_3: The burning candle will help see the message.
localizations.hint_4: This could be useful to open a device.
localizations.hint_6_first: The stone probably marks a starting point, all the more as as there is a wind rose.
localizations.hint_6: Find a message in the room showing the North, South, East, and West directions. Follow this path and write down the numbers.
localizations.hint_7: One of these cards must point out the right bookmark. The page of the old book and the sheet should help you.
localizations.hint_8_first: You must find the words to be pronounced. The amulet's signs will be of great help to you.
localizations.hint_8: Once you have found the signs and their colors, write down the dates.
localizations.hint_10: Useful to hammer a nail… or smash a pane.
localizations.hint_11: This painting is too dusty for anything to be seen.
localizations.hint_24: You need batteries to make it work.
localizations.hint_25: Something is written on the mask, but it's too small to be made out.
localizations.hint_29_first: These triangles are very much alike the brain-teaser on the desk. Therefore, it must produce 4 numbers.
localizations.hint_29: The number of dots in the small triangle indicates the first number, the number of dots in the following triangle indicates the second number, etc.
localizations.hint_30: If this padlock cannot be opened, you should consider smashing the pane.
localizations.hint_32: This key is very peculiar. Take a good look at it.
localizations.hint_35_first: Color needles are stuck in various parts of the body. Five of them are very useful.
localizations.hint_35: Smell = Nose, Taste = Mouth, Hearing = Ear,Touch = Hand, and Sight = Eye
localizations.hint_40_first: You must select specific books. An item in this room will help you for the colors sequence and another one for the letters sequence.
localizations.hint_40: The letters sequence is provided by the message written in invisible ink. The colors sequence by the items' symbols.
localizations.hint_41: There is a lot of dust on the painting…
localizations.hint_42_first: The painting is not far. Maybe it holds a hint about the opening of the safe.
localizations.hint_42: The message on the painting is not what it seems to be. These are geographic coordinates.
localizations.hint_44: These are the 4 items. But first and foremost, it provides the 4 colors in sequence.
localizations.hint_46: It works. You should disassemble it to recover the batteries.
localizations.hint_48_first: Even if the key does not fit, it could be very useful. Take a closer look.
localizations.hint_48: The keyblade is the 4-digit code which will open the safe.
localizations.hint_50: These batteries could be useful in the flashlight.
localizations.hint_52_first: This is not necessarily what it seems to be. It could be coordinates.
localizations.hint_55: This magnifying glass will be useful if you find a text too small to read.
localizations.hint_72: This triangular shape resembles that of the cabinet latch. Four triangles can be made with this object.
localizations.hint_80_first: Something's written but you must look under the right angle.
localizations.hint_80: Close one eye, find the perfect angle and look at the card closely. A text will appear.
localizations.hint_82_first: The colors of the 666 probably mean something.
localizations.hint_82: Black symbol then white then black. But you will have to say the numbers in reverse sequence.
localizations.hint_83: There is something on one of the edges of the fireplace.
localizations.hint_86: A good source of light, or preferably heat, can reveal an invisible text.
localizations.hint_89: These letters will point at certain books in the bookcase.
localizations.hint_91_first: Each line matches one of the five senses. You must choose the right color.
localizations.hint_91: For example: Perfume = smell. What is the color of the needle placed on the man's nose on card 35? Write down these two letters and keep going…
localizations.hint_92: The amulet's signs probably provide the sequence in which the words must be said to stop the curse.
localizations.hint_93: In order to find the right bookmark, you must find the right tarot card. It will give you a card number.
localizations.hint_94: Watch closely:  there's something on the wallpaper.
